rounds.notes: added topic sentences (Context-Approach-Finding-Interpretation) to each Results subsection; strengthened transitions
tightened abstract framing and discussion opener

notes: All numerical values (79.3%, 68.0%, 46.1%, 80%, 44.3%, 50.7%, s=0.3, 80 generations, 33.3 cM, n=701, m=0.01, 0.2-2 cM, ~10^3-10^4 Ne, 60-80 generations, 20 generations, 14 years, 18 provinces, 2,055 isolates, 640 new, 4,026 public, 751/1,304) taken verbatim from the experimental log.
No \input{} used; all sections inline in main.tex.
Citations trace to verified PubMed IDs where available; canonical seminal works included (Ariey 2014, Fidock 2000, Rosvall 2008, Newman 2004).
Figures generated with matplotlib (fig1 bar chart from coverage/clonality statistics, fig2/4 schematics anchored to reported Ne range, fig3 stepping-stone diagram).
Discussion contains 7 paragraphs (>5 required): main finding, mechanism, background relatedness modifier, LD comparison, practical implications, benchmarking framework, limitations, and conclusion.
